Notice Of Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And Fro Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Midland Credit Management's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's Request For Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $240, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Midland Credit Management's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $240, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
